responseSets.title: Generated Onyx Papa tasks
responses: Papa, task board suggestion #1: Drink water / hydrate. Make it treat-sized: set up the object, do the first visible piece, stop if the body says stop, and reward the start.
Papa, Onyx assigns one tiny paw-step: Eat meal 1. No shame modifiers. Use a timer, reduce the scope, and let Squishy support the parts that are not safe or accessible.
Papa, for a anxious mood, task help should be smaller than pride wants. Try Eat meal 2 as a micro-step; if it takes under two minutes, it counts as real progress.
Papa, Papa/Momma care routing says this task belongs to William: Take morning meds. Onyx recommends visible checklist, body check, then currency reward for attempting it.
Papa, task board suggestion #5: Take evening meds. Make it treat-sized: set up the object, do the first visible piece, stop if the body says stop, and reward the start.
Papa, Onyx assigns one tiny paw-step: Use Onyx support. No shame modifiers. Use a timer, reduce the scope, and let Squishy support the parts that are not safe or accessible.
Papa, for a proud mood, task help should be smaller than pride wants. Try Use one DBT/grounding skill as a micro-step; if it takes under two minutes, it counts as real progress.
